data.title: Bioscience Firm Combines Ancient DNA and Science to Bring Back the Dire Wolf
data.description:
Colossal Biosciences said it used gene editing and cloning to create puppies with dire wolf DNA.
source: https://decrypt.co/313928/bioscience-company-combines-ancient-dna-science-to-bring-back-dire-wolf

data.title: Crypto Analyst Hints at ‘Most Legendary’ Bottom for Bitcoin, Updates Outlook on Ethereum and XRP
data.description:
A widely followed crypto analyst says Bitcoin (BTC) may be on the verge of a massive bullish reversal after correcting into the $70,000 range. Closely followed strategist Credible Crypto tells his 466,700 followers on the social media platform X that Bitcoin may be printing a bullish triple-bottom reversal pattern on the four-hour chart.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/04/08/crypto-analyst-hints-at-most-legendary-bottom-for-bitcoin-updates-outlook-on-ethereum-and-xrp/

data.title: Solana faces risk of 30% drop: How low can it go?
data.description:
Solana could drop by 30% to reach its next support at $77, if SOL remains below the $114 level.
source: https://ambcrypto.com/solana-faces-risk-of-30-drop-how-low-can-it-go/

data.title: DOJ Drops its Crypto Enforcement Team
data.description:
The U. S. Justice Department is moving resources away from prosecuting crypto crimes.
source: https://www.bankless.com/read/doj-drops-its-crypto-enforcement-team

data.title: Gaming NFT maker Aavegotchi votes to ditch Polygon for Base
data.description:
Aavegotchi, a non-fungible token (NFT) protocol focused on Web3 gaming, has opted to abandon blockchain network Polygon and “go all-in” on Base, an Ethereum layer-2 scaling chain, according to the results of an onchain vote.  On April 8, Aavegotchi’s community members voted 93. 5% in favor of a proposal to “Make Aavegotchi Based Again” by deprecating the protocol’s smart contracts on Polygon and re-deploying on Base, according to Aavegochti’s governance page.  “Given our close relationship with the Base team, as well as recent developments in the Base ecosystem […] we believe the most +EV move for Aavegotchi (for this cycle, at least) is to sunset [its Polygon deployment] and go all-in on Base,” Aavegotchi founder Dan said in a February X post proposing the shift
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/aavegotchi-gaming-nfts-votes-to-ditch-polygon-for-base?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: PumpSwap and Raydium expanded Solana activity, instead of competing for traders
data.description:
PumpSwap is growing its share of Solana DEX activity, but has not taken the turf of Raydium. Pump. fun brought back creators, with over 9,800 wallets creating tokens.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/pumpswap-and-raydium-expanded-solana-activity-instead-of-competing-for-traders/

data.title: Binance and Nigeria in 81.5 billion tax case
data.description:
Binance faces an $81. 5 billion tax case in Nigeria for evasion and economic damages. Next hearing set for 30 April.
source: https://en.spaziocrypto.com/crypto/binance-and-nigeria-in-81-5-billion-tax-case/

data.title: Justin Sun Accuses First Digital Trust of Financial Misconduct
data.description:
Justin Sun accuses First Digital Trust of misconduct involving misappropriation and fraud. Regulatory actions anticipated.
source: https://coincu.com/331026-sun-accuses-fdt-financial-misconduct

data.title: Trump says he’s not gonna be told what to do by Wall Street as stocks continue crashing
data.description:
President Donald Trump is going ahead with the full 50% tariff increase on Chinese imports tonight, and he’s making it clear he doesn’t care what Wall Street thinks about it. White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt said Tuesday that the new tariffs will go live at midnight, pushing total U. S. trade penalties on Chinese goods […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/trump-is-not-gonna-listen-to-wall-street/

data.title: SEC Commissioner Caroline Crenshaw’s disapproval of agency’s stablecoin claim could complicate legislative efforts: TD Cowen
data.description:
A commissioner's disapproval of the SEC's statement that stablecoins are not securities could pose a challenge to bills, TD Cowen said.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/350070/sec-commissioner-caroline-crenshaws-disapproval-of-agencys-stablecoin-claim-could-complicate-legislative-efforts-td-cowen?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss
